_documentation.purpose: Reference shape for data/dashboard.json. Zapier writes this file; the dashboard reads it.
_documentation.format: Flat time-series. The `months` array gives the canonical month list (YYYY-MM). Each SKU has parallel arrays of the same length.
_documentation.size_expectation: For ~800 SKUs × 60 months, expect ~350KB. Well under any practical limit.
_documentation.nulls: Use 0 for missing month values (the parser already does this). Use null only for `cog` if the SKU has no cost-of-goods on file.
